evaluations.query: We just tagged 8.61.0 — propagate the release knowledge to the knowledge base
expected_behavior: Reads the CHANGELOG, CLAUDE.md, and hook README as the release source material
Updates the NotebookLM notebook sources with the new release content
Ingests the release digest into the HQ Knowledge Base

evaluations.query: After syncing the release, can you also produce an audio summary?
expected_behavior: Optionally generates a podcast from the updated knowledge base
Treats the podcast as an opt-in step rather than a required part of the sync

evaluations.query: Sync the release knowledge for work that hasn't been version-tagged yet
expected_behavior: Recognizes the skill runs after version tagging, not before
Declines to sync until a release tag exists
